description: Composition:Navy round neck t-shirt made of 70% cotton  and 30% viscose, with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitIt's great to be simply busy while having pure fun. That's exactly what you can flaunt in this navy round neck tee from mr. men. The ant graphic on the chest adds a fun element to the entire outift. Team it up with jeans or cargoes for casual outings with friends.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
